question_html: The passive form of "The Home office is going to renew my passport" is –
options_html: My passport will be renewed by the Home office.
My passport is to be renewed by the Home office.
My passport is being renewed by the Home office.
My passport is going to be renewed by the Home office.
correct_answer_html: My passport is going to be renewed by the Home office.
solution_html:
Active: going to + V1

Passive: going to + be + V3
